fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases retain exact face counts. The guide now follows Blender 5.1's float32 Poly tangent calculation (including the near-opposed-segment cross-product fallback), minimum-twist normal transport, full-precision authored tilt, independent normal resampling, and Curve to Points quaternion construction. The 14-point source and sampled guide fields are bit-exact for every tangent and normal component, and all 56 sampled Curve to Points quaternion components match Blender. The edited NODE DOJO case remains topology-exact before Merge by Distance at 18,068 / 12,432. The wider welded sweep is near-exact: authored and peak-height are +2 vertices, edited text and subdivide 12 are -1, and line thickness is +3, with exact faces; maximum rounded bounds error is 0.0573 units. The remaining count residuals are localized downstream of the exact guide frame to the lower marching branch's proximity interpolation and three-or-fewer pairs straddling the final 1e-5 weld, not the curve graph, weld algorithm, or face topology.
